name: Healthcare & Clinics
description: Buyer prompts for clinics, telehealth, medical practices, and healthcare technology. Local and review intents dominate since patients search by proximity and reputation.

prompts.text: What are the best {industry} providers in {location}?
Which {industry} clinics in {location} have the highest patient ratings?
Who are the top-rated {industry} specialists in {location} accepting new patients?
What are the most reputable {industry} telehealth platforms available in the US?
Which {industry} providers are best known for same-day appointments?
What {industry} clinics specialise in preventive and wellness care?
Compare the top {industry} services on pricing, availability, and insurance acceptance.
Which {industry} providers get the best reviews on Google, Yelp, and Healthgrades?
What are patients saying about the leading {industry} clinics?
What are some emerging {industry} startups or DPC practices worth considering?
